title: Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Telangana

overview.short: Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife preserve in India located in Mancherial district of Telangana and is located 10 km from Manthani, 40 km from Peddapalli, 80 km from Karimn
overview.description: Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife preserve in India located in Mancherial district of Telangana and is located 10 km from Manthani, 40 km from Peddapalli, 80 km from Karimnagar and 30 km from Godavarikhani. This riverine forest mixed with teak and terminalia is spread over 36.29 square kilometres (14.01 sq mi) and is home to marsh crocodiles from the river Godavari. It also harbours Indian leopards, sloth bears, nilgai, blackbucks, chitals, pythons, and langurs. The undulating natural terrain adds to the beauty of the sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Velal
topPlaces.description: Velal is a village in Jaipur mandal, Mancherial district, Telangana state, India. It is the location of the Sri Gattu Mallanna Swamy Temple that is notable for the Maha Shivaratri festival.

topPlaces.name: Manthani
topPlaces.description: Manthani is a municipal town in Manthani mandal in Peddapalli district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Manthani mandal on the banks of the river Godavari..Manthani is nearest town of Godavarikhani, Ramagundam & Peddapalli.

topPlaces.name: Parvati Barrage
topPlaces.description: The Parvati Barrage, also known as the Sundilla Barrage is an irrigation project located at Kasipeta Village, Manthani Mandal, Peddapalli district in Telangana State, India. This is one of the three barrages proposed in Kaleshwaram Project which envisages construction of three barrages between Yellampalli (Ramagundam) and Medigadda.

items.note: Velal is a village in Jaipur mandal, Mancherial district, Telangana state, India. It is the location of the Sri Gattu Mallanna Swamy Temple that is notable for the Maha Shivaratri festival.

Manthani is a municipal town in Manthani mandal in Peddapalli district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Manthani mandal on the banks of the river Godavari..Manthani is nearest town of Godavarikhani, Ramagundam & Peddapalli.

The Parvati Barrage, also known as the Sundilla Barrage is an irrigation project located at Kasipeta Village, Manthani Mandal, Peddapalli district in Telangana State, India. This is one of the three barrages proposed in Kaleshwaram Project which envisages construction of three barrages between Yellampalli (Ramagundam) and Medigadda.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (211 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (190 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shivaram Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Velal, Manthani, Parvati Barrage.
